delegation_capability.evidence_ref: Nineteen fresh built-in default read-only review rounds completed through spawn/wait result transport. One transient model-capacity attempt was retried with a fresh default agent and excluded from proof results.

objective: Freeze the HCM-0.3 Context Resolution, Snapshot Memory, delta, and Projection contracts as review-clean documentation/design authority without implementing Rust or selecting shipped runtime defaults.

sections: Canonical artifacts, renderer-derived views, and Projections
Flow resolver through Snapshot Memory rows
Projection disclosure and support evaluator definition

work_completed: Froze the ordered six-dimensional Context Resolution stack, complete envelope, narrowing, mutation, escalation, and promotion contracts.

Froze generic and snapshot-specialized Projection definitions, requests, results, complete rule accounting, exact currentness, omission/proof effects, lossiness, authority preservation, and deterministic disclosure/support evaluation.
Froze immutable Snapshot Memory capture, consistency, redaction, retention, state/record fingerprints, predecessor, delta compatibility, complete change/signal accounting, and grounding contracts.
Defined the exact versioned Projection support-evaluator producer, metadata-only decision inputs/reasons, dependency closure, and fingerprint propagation.
Kept shipped defaults unresolved, all runtime proof gates open, and Rust unchanged.
Completed nineteen fresh built-in reviews, eighteen parent remediations, a clean final verdict, and the full docs-only proof wall.

deliverables.summary: Frozen HCM-0.3 Resolution, Snapshot Memory, and Projection semantics.
Field-complete HCM-0.3 schemas, matrices, refusal rules, examples, and conformance scenarios.
HCM-0.3 proof gate and regression coverage, with runtime gates left open.

decisions.summary: Context Resolution is an ordered six-dimensional contract whose child envelopes can only preserve or narrow authority.
decisions.authority_effect: Requests cannot self-escalate; append-only escalation and promotion dispositions are separately authorized.

decisions.summary: Snapshot Memory is immutable bounded evidence with separate state and record identity, deterministic delta accounting, and exact redaction/retention.
decisions.authority_effect: Snapshots and deltas remain semantic/observation evidence and never become canonical authority by capture or use.

decisions.summary: Projection is definition-owned deterministic transformation with exact currentness, complete rule accounting, typed omissions, and replayable disclosure/support evidence.
decisions.authority_effect: Projection results preserve source authority class and always have authority_effect none.

decisions.summary: Illustrative HCM-0.3 values do not select shipped Resolution labels/defaults, capture policies, Projection catalogs, or disclosure defaults.
decisions.authority_effect: Later implementation/default-selection slices retain authority; all runtime proof gates remain open.

prohibited_scope: Do not reopen HCM-0.3 without new evidence.
Do not implement Rust or treat illustrative values as shipped defaults.
Do not start HCM-0.4 or another slice automatically.

chat_summary: HCM-0.3 froze the docs-only Context Resolution, Snapshot Memory, delta, and Projection contracts after nineteen fresh reviews and eighteen parent remediations. The final state is review-clean; Rust and runtime gates remain untouched, and shipped defaults remain unresolved.
